title: PuneBusRouting Simulation
summary: A transit routing simulation application engineered to calculate optimal travel paths across Pune.
bullets: Developed a transit routing simulation application using C++ to calculate optimal travel paths across Pune.
Engineered the core architecture, leading Qt Framework development and algorithm planning.
Implemented Dijkstra's algorithm to significantly improve route calculation speeds and accuracy.

title: AI playlist analyzer
summary: Analyzed a dataset of 114,000 Spotify tracks, applying clustering and association rule learning to map audio relationships.
bullets: Analyzed a dataset of 114,000 Spotify tracks utilizing Python for comprehensive data mining.
Implemented K-Means clustering to map audio relationships and categorize acoustic profiles.
Applied Apriori and FP-growth association rule learning to discover listening patterns.

title: Orbital Invasion: Protocol
summary: An arcade-style game engine implementing advanced pathfinding logic for enemy entity navigation.
tech: JavaScript, Godot, A* Algorithm, Data Structures
bullets: Built an arcade-style game engine implementing advanced pathfinding logic for enemy entity navigation.
Utilized A* Algorithm, BFS, and UCS to optimize real-time routing logic on the grid.
